evidence_consequence: The optimized local runner now has direct executable evidence that dependency release and dependency reclassification invalidation seeds are not match-promoted as clean recalc; they force rebind/no-publication behavior.
remaining_blocker: This does not yet prove automatic dependency-set transition detection from a changed dynamic binding. A full dynamic release/reclassification differential still requires comparing predecessor and successor dependency descriptors against the TraceCalc release row without manual seed injection.
